reviews.comment:
Parada obligatoria para cargar nafta, buena ubicación sobre la ruta 23, todo limpio, el café normal. Ojalá podría volver pronto..

(Translated by Google)
A must-stop for gas, good location on Route 23, everything clean, the coffee is just okay. I hope I can come back soon.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10372563260926081312/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5ajQ2VHJRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buen servicio siempre!!! Para viajeros cuenta con baños siempre limpios. Un lujo.

(Translated by Google)
Always great service! For travelers, the restrooms are always clean. A real treat.

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Es muy raro, solo te dejan cargar si la tapa del tanque te queda del lado del surtidor, tiene prohibido cruzar la manguera por encima del baúl.... Raro....

(Translated by Google)
It's very strange; they only let you fill up if the gas cap is on the pump side. Crossing the hose over the trunk is prohibited... Weird...

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención por parte del personal, si les preguntabas sabían el estado de las rutas, lo cual fue crucial para decidir el camino, faltarían unos Paradores con sombra y sería perfecto

(Translated by Google)
Very good attention from the staff, if you asked them they knew the state of the routes, which was crucial to decide the route, some Paradores with shade were missing and it would be perfect
